author.bio: 总之岁月漫长，然而值得等待
author.name: hidaris

group.title: The Expression Problem Revisited
group.author: hidaris
group.excerpt: The Expression Problem is a new name for an old problem. The goal is to define a datatype by cases, where one can add new cases to the datatype and new functions over the datatype, without recompiling existing code, and while retaining static type safety (e.g., no casts).

author.bio: 总之岁月漫长，然而值得等待
author.name: hidaris
